name: agent-workflows
description: Portable Markdown workflows for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable workflows for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Capture session context, audit projects safely, and discover requirements before planning.
defaultPrompt: Use $session-handoff to preserve this project's context.
Use $project-audit to perform a deep, read-only audit of this project.
Use $idea-discovery-interview to turn my idea into a buildable plan.
